question: Is the act or omission causing a common injury, danger or annoyance to the public or to people in general?

yes.question: Is the act or omission likely to spread the infection of any disease dangerous to life?

yes.name: Negligent act likely to spread infection of disease dangerous to life

no.question: Is the act or omission related to food or drink?

yes.question: Is the food or drink adulterated?

yes.name: Adulteration of food or drink intended for sale

no.name: Sale of noxious food or drink

no.question: Is the act or omission related to drugs or medical preparations?

yes.question: Is the drug or medical preparation adulterated?

no.question: Is the act or omission related to a public spring or reservoir?

yes.name: Fouling water of public spring or reservoir

no.question: Is the act or omission related to a public way or line of navigation?

yes.name: Danger or obstruction in public way or line of navigation

no.question: Is the act or omission related to a vessel?
Is the act or omission related to a public servant?

yes.name: Continuance of nuisance after injunction to discontinue

no.question: Is the act or omission related to a building?

yes.name: Negligent conduct with respect to pulling down, repairing or constructing buildings, etc.

no.question: Is the act or omission related to an animal?

yes.name: Negligent conduct with respect to animal

no.question: Is the act or omission related to a public nuisance?

yes.name: Punishment for public nuisance in cases not otherwise provided for

no.question: Is the act or omission related to a lottery?
Is the act or omission related to an obscene object?

yes.name: Sale, etc., of obscene books, etc.

no.question: Is the act or omission related to a child?

group: OF OFFENCES AFFECTING THE PUBLIC HEALTH, SAFETY, CONVENIENCE, DECENCY AND MORALS
